nasb.text: Then the remnant of Jacob Will be among many peoples Like dew from the Lord, Like showers on vegetation Which do not wait for man Or delay for the sons of men.

esv.text: Then the remnant of Jacob shall be in the midst of many peoples like dew from the Lord, like showers on the grass, which delay not for a man nor wait for the children of man.

cnv.text: 那時，雅各的餘民， 必在許多民族中， 像從耶和華那裡降下的露水， 又像甘霖降在草上， 不期望於人， 也不等候世人。

ccb.text: 雅各余剩的子孙将在万民中像从耶和华那里降下的雨露， 又像洒在草上的甘霖。 他们不依靠人， 不冀望于世人。
